# Maximum Roofing

> Commercial and residential roofing contractor serving Staten Island, Brooklyn, Queens, and the Bronx, New York. Specializing in TPO roofing, commercial roofing, flat roof repair, and emergency roofing services.

## Website

https://www.maximumroofing.us/

## Contact

Business: Maximum Roofing
Phone: (732) 395-3945
Email: jamesleo@maximumroofing.us
Address: 11 John Street, Staten Island, NY 10302

## Key Services

- Commercial Roofing
  https://www.maximumroofing.us/commercial-roofing.html
  Commercial roof installation, replacement, and repair.

- TPO Roofing
  https://www.maximumroofing.us/tporoofing.html
  TPO membrane installation and repair for commercial and flat roofs.

- Flat Roof Repair
  https://www.maximumroofing.us/flat-roof-repair.html
  Leak detection and flat roof restoration.

- Roof Repair
  https://www.maximumroofing.us/roof-repair.html
  Residential and commercial roof repairs.

- EPDM Roofing
  https://www.maximumroofing.us/epdm-roofing.html
  EPDM rubber roofing systems.

- Torch Down Roofing
  https://www.maximumroofing.us/torch-down-roofing.html
  Modified bitumen and torch-down roofing.

- Commercial Silicone Roof Coatings
  https://www.maximumroofing.us/commercial-silicone-roofing.html
  Silicone restoration systems for commercial roofs.

- Residential Roofing
  https://www.maximumroofing.us/residential-roofing.html
  Asphalt shingle roof replacement and repair.

## Service Areas

- Staten Island
- Brooklyn
- Queens
- Bronx
